package rulecoverage

func PositiveTimeLoadlocationPerCall() string {
    ruleID := "time_loadlocation_per_call"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`time.LoadLocation(...)` inside request or loop paths instead of reusing the location."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
